tasks.title: Create CLAUDE.md with Project Architecture
tasks.description: Create comprehensive CLAUDE.md documenting project architecture, event schema, data flow, and development commands

tasks.title: Create data/sources.json Configuration
tasks.description: Define curated event sources with Lu.ma calendars (aihouse, belle), Meetup groups, Eventbrite, and GeekWire. Include type, URL, tags, and enabled flag for each source.

tasks.title: Create Base Crawl4AI Scraper
tasks.description: Implement scripts/scrape.py with SeattleHacksScraper class. Load sources, iterate enabled sources, call type-specific parsers, generate event IDs via SHA256 hash, filter future events.

tasks.title: Create Lu.ma Parser
tasks.description: Implement scripts/parsers/luma.py to extract events from Lu.ma calendar pages. Parse JSON-LD structured data, extract title, startTime, endTime, location, cost, sourceUrl.

tasks.title: Create Meetup Parser
tasks.description: Implement scripts/parsers/meetup.py to extract events from Meetup group pages. Parse Schema.org structured data or API if available.

tasks.title: Create Eventbrite Parser
tasks.description: Implement scripts/parsers/eventbrite.py to extract events from Eventbrite pages. Parse Schema.org structured data for event details.

tasks.title: Create Generic Parser
tasks.description: Implement scripts/parsers/generic.py as fallback parser using CSS selectors and common patterns for sites without structured data.

tasks.title: Implement JSON Output Generator
tasks.description: Add events.json generation to scraper. Output includes version, generatedAt timestamp, eventCount, and sorted events array. Write to data/events.json.

tasks.title: Implement iCal Output Generator
tasks.description: Add events.ics generation using icalendar library. Create VCALENDAR with VEVENT components including uid, summary, dtstart, dtend, location, description, url. Write to data/events.ics.

tasks.title: Create Static Website Frontend
tasks.description: Build docs/index.html with Tailwind CDN, dark theme, event filters (category, cost), responsive grid layout. Create docs/app.js to fetch events.json and render event cards.

tasks.title: Create VPS Deployment Scripts
tasks.description: Create setup.sh for one-time VPS setup (clone repo, create venv, install deps, run crawl4ai-setup). Create run-scraper.sh for cron execution with git diff check before commit.

tasks.title: Configure Cron and Initial Data Population
tasks.description: Set up cron job on VPS for Sunday 10pm PST execution. Run initial scrape to populate data. Verify GitHub Pages deployment.
